# License — illustrations-humaaans

## Upstream

- Author: Pablo Stanley (Copyright 2019)
- Site: https://www.humaaans.com
- Upstream `LICENSE.md` preserved in this folder.
- Per Pablo Stanley: free for personal and commercial use, no attribution required, cannot be resold as standalone asset.

## Acquisition note

Acquired via `git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Calinou/humaaans` (community mirror of the public humaaans.com download bundle). `.git` directory removed. Upstream `LICENSE.md` retained in this folder.

## Use in Clawmachine

Internal non-commercial use by a single UK operator (Regan Cooney) for a private electronics fix-and-flip tool. Mix-and-match recompositions for avatar / figure slots fall inside upstream license terms. No resale of illustrations as standalone assets.

Fair use position: zero-dollar internal prototype, no distribution, no monetisation of the assets.
